title: GEN and Startup Genome have officially launched the 2026 Global ...
full_text:
Global Entrepreneurship Network's Post
Global Entrepreneurship Network
June 17 at 5:01 AM ·
GEN and Startup Genome have officially launched the 2026 Global Startup Ecosystem Report ( #GSER2026 ) at Viva Technology , Paris.
Dive into compelling new insights on global startup trends, explore the Top 40 global ecosystems, Top 100 emerging ecosystems, and regional rankings — all designed to guide policymakers, ecosystem leaders, and founders.
This year marks a major shift — for the first time, the global rankings incorporate the strength of AI startup activity — spotlighting the rise of AI driving transformation across industries. This new AI factor helps assess how well ecosystems are transitioning into the AI era.
The #GSER2026 also reveals a pivotal turning point in the global startup landscape:
Global startup Ecosystem Value has grown 40% in one year, reaching $10.9 trillion — but three U.S. ecosystems captured two-thirds of that growth.
The AI-Native sub-sector is on track to become the largest share of global startup Ecosystem Value within 3 years, growing $2.1 trillion (140%) this year vs. 15.9% for the rest of tech.
86% of all late-stage funding to AI-Native startups now flows to North America — up from 56% of overall late-stage funding in 2021 — with the gap between leading and lagging ecosystems widening rapidly.
Access the full #GSER2026 now: https://startupgenome.com/gser2026
All reactions:
16
1 comment
4 shares
Like
Comment
Most relevant
Ali Omer Congratulations
